15.dv: from H2224 (זָרַח) (in the sense of springing up);

16.gl: to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative
16.kj: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, fur

16.gl: flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman
16.kj: body, (fat, lean) flesh(-ed), kin, (man-) kind, [phrase] nakedness, self, skin.

16.gl: to trample; hence, to wash (properly, by stamping with the feet), whether literal (including the fulling process) or figurative

16.kj: fault, iniquity, mischeif, punishment (of iniquity), sin.
16.dv: or עָווֹן; (2 Kings 7:9; Psalm 51:5 (H7 (אֲבַד))), from H5753 (עָוָה);

16.gl: to lave (the whole or a part of a thing)
